title: RunnerOutput
description: RunnerOutput JSON written by a Runner to stdout (exactly one object). Carries raw per-operation samples plus run metadata. CPU/RAM samples are collected externally by the Harness. Derived from design.md (Data Models / RunnerOutput).

scenarioId.description: Scenario identifier this run belongs to.

cryptoProfileId.description: Crypto_Profile identifier used for the run.

processStartupMs.description: Process_Startup_Time, cold_start only. Supplementary cold-start metric, NOT merged into core/steady-state (Req 21.4, 21.7). null when not applicable.

hardwareAccel.description: Whether hardware AES (AES-NI) was actually used (Req 23.1).

keySetChecksumSeen.description: Checksum the Runner actually computed for the Key_Set it loaded (Req 4.6).

corpusChecksumSeen.description: Checksum the Runner actually computed for the Test_Corpus it loaded (Req 4.6).

gc.description: GC statistics reported by the Runner (Req 17.2, 17.3). null when unavailable.

operations.description: Raw per-operation samples; every value retained for audit (Req 10.1, 20.5).

resourceSamplesNote.description: Free-text note (e.g. that CPU/RAM are sampled externally by the Harness).

checksum.description: Checksum string in the form 'sha256:<64 hex chars>'.

originalBytes.description: Size of the original file in bytes.

ciphertextBytes.description: Ciphertext size in bytes (Req 18.3, 30.3). null when skipped.

skipReason.description: Reason a file was skipped, if any (Req 32.3, 32.7).

asymEncryptMs.description: Asymmetric encrypt time in ms; -1 if not separable (Req 24.3).

asymDecryptMs.description: Asymmetric decrypt time in ms; -1 if not separable (Req 24.3).

symEncryptMs.description: Symmetric encrypt time in ms; -1 if not separable (Req 24.3).

symDecryptMs.description: Symmetric decrypt time in ms; -1 if not separable (Req 24.3).

outputFileName.description: Output file name per naming rule (Req 32.2, 32.4).
